Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to use as source material for email content.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes and sends the AI-generated email to segmented R1 Concepts contact lists via the HubSpot Marketing Email API.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes Dynamic Friction Company product pages, friction material details, and current offers to ground the email in accurate content.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls newly created or updated support tickets from HubSpot, including customer messages, order details, and ticket metadata.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all form submissions from the Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form stored in HubSpot, including customer complaints and order data.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Customer-facing AI agent for R1 Concepts is currently in development with connections to be determined.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for content creators matching provided keywords, retrieving channel data, subscriber counts, and recent video performance.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves stored creator profiles, outreach sequences, and prompt templates from Drive folders to inform personalized outreach.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes incoming creator replies and generates contextually appropriate negotiation responses using learned patterns from prior influencer conversations.

Creator Reponse.action: Reads incoming creator reply emails and sends AI-crafted negotiation responses back within the existing thread.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates compelling email copy for new product launch announcements and monthly recap emails using DFC product data and brand messaging guidelines.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth, and email performance data to populate marketing reporting figures.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Eliminates back-and-forth email requests and gives Mark a clean, repeatable self-service entry point that kicks off the entire catalog process instantly.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries DFC's Dream inventory system using the submitted vehicle spec to retrieve all parts currently stocked for that application and identify gaps in coverage.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Pulls live, accurate inventory data in seconds rather than requiring someone to manually search and cross-reference parts across the catalog.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Formats the raw inventory data into a structured, readable catalog layout, labeling what DFC stocks and clearly flagging what is missing for that vehicle.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Produces a polished, decision-ready catalog output without any manual formatting work, making it immediately useful for Mark's sales and procurement conversations.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark the completed Excel catalog file as an attachment, ready for use in customer conversations or internal review.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog directly to Mark within minutes of his form submission, replacing a process that would otherwise take hours of manual lookup and formatting.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, retrieving on-hand quantities, on-order records, and in-transit shipment data.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups with a single automated pull, saving significant collective hours and ensuring everyone is working from the same data.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Merges the live Dream inventory data into the existing backorder report, enriching each line item with current status and flagging parts that have no viable fulfillment source.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into a fully enriched, action-ready report that shows exactly which orders need attention and which are unresolvable.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for affected backorder items, pre-populated with the relevant status details for each order.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Gives the team ready-to-send customer updates in minutes instead of requiring individual staff members to research and write each communication manually.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor fitment data including make, model, year, and part specifications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Captures a complete competitive catalog in a fraction of the time manual research would take, ensuring DFC has full market visibility without assigning it to a person.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify overlaps, gaps, and potential new SKU opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC has coverage and where it is missing product, giving the team a clear prioritized list for catalog expansion decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers asking for demand data on specific two-piece rotor applications identified as gaps in DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers real demand signals from customers at scale without requiring a sales rep to manually reach out to each contact, accelerating the product decision process.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalog data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into a single formatted output sheet for Dino's review.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a complete, organized reference document that Dino can use immediately for sourcing and catalog decisions without any manual assembly.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad creative and copy fields — including headlines, body text, and descriptions — across every live campaign.
Meta Investigation.impact: Scans the entire active ad library in seconds, providing complete copy coverage that would take a human reviewer significant time to gather manually.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every pulled ad copy field for specified phrases or patterns and generates a flagged list identifying the exact ad, field, and matching text for each hit.
Meta Investigation.impact: Pinpoints every instance of a problematic or targeted phrase across hundreds of ads instantly, eliminating the risk of missing a match in a manual review.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails the complete flagged results list to the requester, showing each matched ad with the specific field and exact copy where the phrase was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, actionable investigation report on demand, giving compliance or marketing teams everything they need to take immediate corrective action.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts the resume attachment and applicant details from each email as it arrives.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures every application is captured and processed immediately, eliminating the backlog that builds when a shared inbox relies on a person to triage it.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to a structured folder in Drive, organized by role and applicant name for easy retrieval.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a clean, searchable archive of all applications so hiring managers can find any resume instantly without digging through email threads.

Resume Bot.action: Scores each resume against the requirements of the relevant open role and assigns a decision of approve, deny, or pause, along with a brief rationale.
Resume Bot.impact: Replaces hours of initial resume screening with consistent, criteria-based evaluations delivered instantly, freeing recruiters to focus only on qualified candidates.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant, their score, decision, and role to a master dashboard with a dedicated Pending tab for candidates tied to paused roles, and triggers auto-reply emails to denied or no-resume applicants.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the recruiting team a real-time, organized view of every application decision while ensuring no candidate goes without a response, protecting the company's employer brand.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is moving along strong — we currently have **56 total agents** across the board, with **28 completed**, **10 in progress**, and **18 planned**. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages. While it was a quieter week on the tracking side, our growing fleet of completed agents continues running in the background — driving daily emails, support automation, creator outreach, paid media audits, and more. Stay tuned as our in-progress builds push closer to the finish line!
